title: 笑う会長は服着たがる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf corners me one day, a serious
expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I realize this is sudden, but would you join me on
an errand?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I fear I may not have the strength to go alone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What could have daunted Symboli Rudolf so
badly? Curious, I decide to go with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She leads me to a T-shirt shop.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"My bicycle is two-tired"... "My calendar's days
are numbered"...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Pfft. This store is truly dangerous. Had I come
alone, I daresay I would be clutching my sides at
this very moment.
choice_data_list: So this place sells punny T-shirts?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, precisely. Despite their unassuming
typeface, each one carries a marvelous display of
wit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I discovered this shop in the course of my endless
search for new puns. I've always wanted to browse
through it properly.
choice_data_list: Do you often go searching for new jokes?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Dedication is the soul of wit. Never stop
practicing, and always be on the lookout for new
material."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Or so it says in my copy of "Comedy for
Dummies," at any rate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's quite the enlightening read. I could lend it to
you, if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You have but to ask.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, to the point. Armed with one of these
T-shirts, I fancy I could have the entire academy
doubled over.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What do you think?
choice_data_list: These gags might be a bit advanced.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You raise a good point. Not everybody will
appreciate such subtle humor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It may very well fall flat, and then what would be
the point?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll hold off on debuting one of these
shirts in public for now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Still, with that said...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like to purchase one, at least. My
signature punwear, if you will.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you suppose you could help me pick one out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enter the shop and spend a while browsing
T-shirts together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahahaha! Oh, this is priceless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doing our best to keep straight faces, we settle
on a favorite and leave with a new shirt and a
fond memory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would, wouldn't I? I can only imagine the howls
of laughter.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be long before the entire academy was
plunged into chaos...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, I'd be opening Pandora's box. Thank you for
bringing me to my senses.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Still, with that said...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like to purchase one, at least. My
signature punwear, if you will.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you suppose you could help me pick one out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enter the shop and spend a while browsing
T-shirts together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahahaha! Oh, this is priceless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doing our best to keep straight faces, we settle
on a favorite and leave with a new shirt and a
fond memory.
